subcodes.first_line: O thou who art thirsty for the Fountain of Truth! Thy letter was received and the account of thy life has been known.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای تشنه چشمه حقیقت نامه ات رسید و ترجمه حیاتت معلوم گردید الحمد لله همیشه
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @spiritual transformation, @second birth, @power of prayer, @being a source of light; guidance, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
